A Rudimentary NBA Game Betting System, or How I Learned R Chapter 1 Description

A Rudimentary NBA Game Betting System, or How I Learned R Alex Rubin 2022-10-17 Chapter 1 Description This book is an archive and reference point for my efforts to learn R via the creation and implementation of a system for predicting NBA game outcomes. It is written in R Markdown and compiled by the bookdown package, which can be installed from CRAN or Github: install.packages("bookdown")
